title: salvia subbipinnata
intro: Salvia subbipinnata, also known as African blue sage, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and aiding in digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Salvia subbipinnata can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
